description_long: This object consists of two modern semi-automatic handguns, each equipped with a cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel, and surrounded by numerous loose copper-colored bullets. The handguns feature matte black metal slides and frames, with textured polymer grips for secure handling. The slides have visible serrations for improved manipulation, and the trigger guards are robust and slightly squared. The suppressors are matte black and seamlessly integrated with the barrels, giving the firearms a tactical appearance. The bullets are scattered around the handguns, emphasizing their readiness for use. The overall design is utilitarian and tactical, suitable for law enforcement or covert urban scenarios.
description: Two black semi-automatic handguns with suppressors and textured grips, surrounded by scattered copper bullets. The design is tactical and modern, with matte finishes and detailed components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzles of both handguns with attached suppressors and a spread of bullets encircling the firearms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the handguns, the full length of the suppressors, and the detailed grip textures.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the handguns, the slide serrations, and the arrangement of bullets around the objects.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the ejection ports, slide details, and the ergonomic contours of the grips.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with ergonomic shaping to fit the hand comfortably, featuring a stippled or checkered texture for enhanced traction. The material appears to be a matte black polymer, providing both durability and a non-slip surface. Subtle finger grooves are present, aiding in secure handling, and the grip panels are slightly flared at the base for improved control. There are no visible logos or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian, tactical design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and slightly squared with a gentle undercut at the rear for improved finger placement. It is thick and solid, providing ample protection for the trigger, and features a smooth matte finish. The front of the guard is flat, possibly allowing for a support-hand finger hold, and there are no visible texturing or decorative elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is extended and threaded to accommodate a cylindrical suppressor, giving it a tactical profile. The suppressor is matte black and seamlessly attached, with no visible porting or fluting. The barrel length is longer than standard due to the suppressor, and there are no visible external markings or compensators.
attribute_slide_markings: The slides have minimal visible markings, with faint serrations at the rear for grip. There are no prominent manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers visible in the images. The overall appearance is clean and unadorned, focusing on function over decoration.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, with a slight bevel for easier insertion and removal. There are no finger rests, extensions, or visible logos, and the design is simple and utilitarian, matching the overall tactical aesthetic.
